events.summary: Phase 2 (Tasks) opened. Enhancement burndown of 103 P1 ui-audit findings across 42 files in 8 feature areas. Plan: 5 PRs, ~10h, sequenced high-impact + low-complexity first. ~92% lightweight token-substitution (DS-MAGIC-FRAME 62 + DS-RAW-FONT-SHORTHAND 26 + DS-MAGIC-PADDING 6); only 6 S-complexity (DS-A11Y-BUTTON).
Phase 2 (Tasks) approved by user. 28 tasks across 6 buckets. 5-PR sequence: Shared (30) → Training (16) → Nutrition (15) → Auth (14) → Bundled minor (28). Total 103 P1 findings → target 0.
Phase 4 (Implementation) opened. Creating isolated worktree at /Volumes/DevSSD/FitTracker2-ios-p1 off origin/main. Starting with PR-1 (Bucket A — Shared, 30 findings).
